entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, `word_id` INTEGER, `word` TEXT, `gender` TEXT, `declension_type` TEXT, `json` TEXT)

indices.name: index_DOCUMENT_word
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_DOCUMENT_word` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`word`)

indices.name: index_DOCUMENT_gender
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_DOCUMENT_gender` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`gender`)

indices.name: index_DOCUMENT_declension_type
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_DOCUMENT_declension_type` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`declension_type`)
